description_long: This object is a whimsical, humanoid figure constructed primarily from wooden barrels and buckets, with metal bands reinforcing the staves. The central body is a large, horizontally-oriented barrel, adorned with patches of green moss or ivy, giving it an aged, weathered look. Two smaller barrels form the upper torso or neck, while the arms and legs are made from smaller barrels, buckets, and wooden planks, some of which are capped with metal or fitted with spigots and taps. The left arm ends in a bucket with a tap, while the right arm features a large, reinforced barrel with metal claws. A woven basket is attached to the back, and various copper pipes and fittings are visible, adding to the object's mechanical and fantastical appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of utility and character, making it suitable as a decorative or thematic urban object.
description: A humanoid figure assembled from wooden barrels, buckets, and metal fittings, featuring mossy details, a woven basket, and mechanical elements.
description_view_0: The left side reveals the large central barrel, a bucket arm with a tap, and the woven basket attached to the back.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the basket, the back of the main barrel, and the dual upper barrels with visible copper pipes.
description_view_2: The right side shows the reinforced barrel arm with metal claws and the wooden plank leg, with less visibility of the basket.
description_view_3: The front view displays the humanoid face, both arms, and the detailed arrangement of barrels and metal fittings.
attribute_handle_type: side handles, integrated grip, rope handle
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops on barrels and buckets
